_publications._publicationTitle: Cognitive dysfunction in NF1 knock-out mice may result from altered vesicular trafficking of APP/DRD3 complex.

_contextSnippet: Learning and memory deficits observed in human Neurofibromatosis type 1 patients have been modeled in a Nf1 gene knock-out murine system showing well characterized spatial learning and memory deficiencies
details: Exhibit well characterized spatial learning and memory deficiencies
